item.title: First reading, referred to Early Learning & Human Services.
item.description: First reading, referred to Early Learning & Human Services.
item.guid: 2026-01-21/First reading, referred to Early Learning & Human Services.

item.title: 👎💵Melissa Johnson - Community Residential Services Association
item.description: Melissa Johnson signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Community Residential Services Association. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎Randy Hauck - Community Residential Services Association
item.description: Randy Hauck signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Community Residential Services Association.

item.title: 👍Demas Nesterenko - SEIU775
item.description: Demas Nesterenko signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent SEIU775.

item.title: 👍Catherine Kamau - Direct Service Provider
item.description: Catherine Kamau signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Direct Service Provider.

item.title: 👍Dakota Bartosch - Direct Service Provider
item.description: Dakota Bartosch signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Direct Service Provider.

item.title: 👍Trent Mulder - Direct Service Provider
item.description: Trent Mulder signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Direct Service Provider.
